headline: Teledyne e2v introduces the Caiman module: a compact imaging solution for low light imaging
summary: Teledyne e2v’s Caiman module Teledyne e2v’s Caiman module for low light imaging GRENOBLE, France, April 21, 2026 (GLOBE NEWSWIRE) -- Teledyne e2v, a Teledyne Technologies [NYSE: TDY] company and global innovator of imaging solutions, announces the launch of the Caiman™ imaging module, a small, lightweight, low power solution designed for demanding low light applications.
